Can only be called by the current owner."}},"title":"xStocksGrid","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"claimMultiple(uint256[])":{"notice":"Batch claim \u2014 all bets must be the same GridToken."},"claimWinnings(uint256)":{"notice":"Claim GridToken winnings. Then redeem for USDC and optionally         use xChange (Backed) to get real xStock deposited in your wallet."},"depositLiquidity(address,uint256)":{"notice":"LP deposits USDC. Pool receives GridTokens (1:1). LP gets shares.         Share NAV rises as bettors lose (GridTokens accumulate in pool)."},"depositUsdc(address,uint256)":{"notice":"Deposit USDC, receive GridTokens 1:1.         $1 USDC  \u2192  1 GridToken (= 1e18 wei of GridToken)"},"freePoolGridTokens(address)":{"notice":"Free GridTokens in pool not locked for pending payouts."},"getGridMatrix(address)":{"notice":"Full grid matrix for frontend rendering."},"getTokenConfig(address)":{"notice":"Returns the full TokenConfig struct for a token (used by xStockVault)."},"placeBet(address,int8,uint8,uint256)":{"notice":"Place a bet using GridTokens.         1 GridToken = 1 USDC of exposure.         Bet 100 GridTokens \u2192 win at 2.2x \u2192 receive 220 GridTokens."},"previewMultiplier(address,int8,uint8)":{"notice":"Preview cell multiplier (no gas, call from frontend)."},"redeemForUsdc(address,uint256)":{"notice":"Burn GridTokens, receive USDC 1:1.         1 GridToken (1e18)  \u2192  $1 USDC (1_000_000)         After redeeming, use xChange (Backed API) to get real xStock."},"resolveBet(uint256)":{"notice":"TOUCH resolution: up bets win if HIGH >= target, down if LOW <= target."},"resolveBets(uint256[])":{"notice":"Batch resolve \u2014 skips bets not yet resolvable."},"shareNAV(address)":{"notice":"USDC value per LP share (6 dec)."},"withdrawLiquidity(address,uint256)":{"notice":"LP burns shares, receives proportional USDC.         Value accrues because losing bets leave GridTokens in pool."}},"notice":"Grid-based prediction market for xStocks tokenized equities. \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550  TOKEN ECONOMICS  (1 GridToken = 1 USDC, always) \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550  depositUsdc($100)   \u2192  mint 100 GridTokens   (1:1)  redeemForUsdc(100)  \u2192  burn 100 GridTokens, receive $100 USDC  (1:1)  The stock price is used ONLY for GridMath multiplier calculation.  It does NOT affect how many GridTokens are issued \u2014 that is always 1:1.  After redeeming to USDC, users call xChange (Backed API) off-chain  to swap their USDC for real xQQQ / xSPY / etc. tokens. \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550  GRID \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550       T+1    T+2    T+3    T+4    T+5  +5   x1.8   x2.2   x2.8   x3.5   x4.2  +3   x1.4   x1.8   x2.2   x2.7   x3.3  [0]  \u2500 CURRENT PRICE \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500  -3   x1.4   x1.8   x2.2   x2.7   x3.3  TOUCH semantics: bet wins if HIGH (up) or LOW (down) touches target. \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550  LP POOL \u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550\u2550  LPs deposit USDC \u2192 pool holds GridTokens (1:1 backed). owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

returns.payoutFor100: Payout in GridTokens for a 100 GridToken (=$100) bet.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

claimMultiple(uint256[]).notice: Batch claim — all bets must be the same GridToken.

claimWinnings(uint256).notice: Claim GridToken winnings. Then redeem for USDC and optionally         use xChange (Backed) to get real xStock deposited in your wallet.

depositLiquidity(address,uint256).notice: LP deposits USDC. Pool receives GridTokens (1:1). LP gets shares.         Share NAV rises as bettors lose (GridTokens accumulate in pool).

depositUsdc(address,uint256).notice: Deposit USDC, receive GridTokens 1:1.         $1 USDC  →  1 GridToken (= 1e18 wei of GridToken)

freePoolGridTokens(address).notice: Free GridTokens in pool not locked for pending payouts.

getGridMatrix(address).notice: Full grid matrix for frontend rendering.

getTokenConfig(address).notice: Returns the full TokenConfig struct for a token (used by xStockVault).

placeBet(address,int8,uint8,uint256).notice: Place a bet using GridTokens.         1 GridToken = 1 USDC of exposure.         Bet 100 GridTokens → win at 2.2x → receive 220 GridTokens.

previewMultiplier(address,int8,uint8).notice: Preview cell multiplier (no gas, call from frontend).

redeemForUsdc(address,uint256).notice: Burn GridTokens, receive USDC 1:1.         1 GridToken (1e18)  →  $1 USDC (1_000_000)         After redeeming, use xChange (Backed API) to get real xStock.

resolveBet(uint256).notice: TOUCH resolution: up bets win if HIGH >= target, down if LOW <= target.

resolveBets(uint256[]).notice: Batch resolve — skips bets not yet resolvable.

shareNAV(address).notice: USDC value per LP share (6 dec).

withdrawLiquidity(address,uint256).notice: LP burns shares, receives proportional USDC.         Value accrues because losing bets leave GridTokens in pool.
